sentences.arabic: تَذْهَبُ سَمِيرَةُ إِلَى السُّوبَرْمَارْكِتِ كُلَّ جُمُعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Samira svaki petak ide u supermarket.
sentences.translationEn: Samira goes to the supermarket every Friday.

sentences.translation: Piše listu stvari koje su joj potrebne.
sentences.translationEn: She writes a list of the things she needs.

sentences.arabic: تَشْتَرِي فَقَطْ مَا هُوَ مَكْتُوبٌ فِي القَائِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kupuje samo ono što je napisano na listi.
sentences.translationEn: She buys only what is written on the list.

sentences.arabic: بِهَذِهِ الطَّرِيقَةِ لَا تُنْفِقُ نُقُودًا كَثِيرَةً.
sentences.translation: Na ovaj način ne troši puno novca.
sentences.translationEn: This way she does not spend a lot of money.

sentences.arabic: تَدْفَعُ عِنْدَ الصُّنْدُوقِ وَتَعُودُ إِلَى البَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Plaća na kasi i vraća se kući.
sentences.translationEn: She pays at the checkout and returns home.
